New-Gen UV Filters

  • Tinosorb M - broad spectrum photostable filter
  • Mexoryl SX - advanced UVA protection
  • Avobenzone - stabilized for long-lasting defense

Skincare Actives

  • C-Hyaluron Complex™ - deep hydration + glow
  • Vitamin C (Ethyl Ascorbic Acid) - brightening & tan removal
  • Papaya Extract - natural exfoliation & even tone
  • Niacinamide - pore refinement & oil control
  • Ceramides - barrier repair

Anti-Pollution

  • Biosaccharide Gum-4 - shields from urban aggressors
Helps with
Glow Boosting Pigmentation Tan Prevention

Dr. Meera's sunscreen rules

  • 3+ new-gen photostable filters (Mexoryl, Tinosorb M)
  • In-vitro & in-vivo tested - SPF 50.08 / 51.21
  • Oxybenzone-free formula
  • Non-comedogenic - won't clog pores
  • Apply 15 mins before sun exposure
  • Goes AFTER serum, BEFORE makeup
  • Reapply every 3-4 hours outdoors
  • Don't forget neck, ears & hands
  • Activate your pump: press 15-20 times before first use
Day 0 Day 28
‹›
Clinically proven

Evaluated on an Ethics Committee–approved protocol, on healthy human volunteers, over 28 days of use.

IMG - pump onto palm
Step 1 / 4PumpDispense 2–4 pumps onto your palm, based on how much sun you're facing.
IMG - dot on face
Step 2 / 4ApplyDot onto forehead, cheeks, nose, chin & neck.
IMG - massage in
Step 3 / 4SpreadMassage in upward & outward motions till fully absorbed.
IMG - reapply outdoors
Step 4 / 4ReapplyTop up every 3–4 hours in direct sun or after sweating.
Frequency & pro tips
Use twice daily · AM final step (after serum, before makeup) · reapply before heading out. Wait 15 mins before sun. Don't forget ears, neck & hands. Works under makeup.

FAQs

Your questions, answered.

Does this leave a white cast?+
No. The formula is designed to be invisible on all skin tones - the gel texture blends with zero white residue.
Can I use this on oily / acne-prone skin?+
Yes - it's non-comedogenic with a lightweight gel texture that won't make you greasy.
How often should I reapply?+
Every 3-4 hours outdoors or when sweating. Indoors with minimal sun, one application lasts up to 12 hours.
Can I wear makeup over this?+
Yes. It has a dewy finish that makes makeup look better. Wait 2-3 mins after applying.
Is this safe for sensitive skin?+
Dermatologist-tested, fragrance-free, no harsh chemicals. Patch test first if extremely sensitive.
Does it help with tan removal?+
Yes - Vitamin C + Papaya Extract help remove tan. 72% of users saw reduction in the first wash.
Can I use this during pregnancy?+
Formulated without oxybenzone. We recommend consulting your doctor before any new product during pregnancy.
Is this water-resistant?+
It has good staying power, but reapply after swimming or heavy sweating for best protection.
How do I activate the pump for first use?+
Press the pump 15-20 times until product dispenses - normal for airless packaging.
What does photostable mean?+
The UV filters don't break down in sunlight, so protection stays effective for 12+ hours.

Everything about Glow+

Experience Glow+ Dewy Sunscreen+
A lightweight gel sunscreen with SPF 50+ PA++++ that melts in with a dewy, no-white-cast finish. Powered by Tinosorb M, Mexoryl SX, Vitamin C & Papaya Extract for daily UV, tan & pollution defense.
Who is it Best for?+
Oily, dry, combination, sensitive & normal skin. Non-comedogenic, fragrance-free and suitable for all genders - ideal for daily city wear and metro commutes.
How to Use?+
Pump 2-4 times based on activity, dot on forehead, cheeks, nose, chin & neck, then spread upward. Apply 15 mins before sun exposure and reapply every 3-4 hours outdoors.
Ingredients List+
Tinosorb M, Mexoryl SX, Avobenzone, C-Hyaluron Complex™, Vitamin C (Ethyl Ascorbic Acid), Papaya Extract, Niacinamide, Ceramides, Biosaccharide Gum-4. No oxybenzone.
FAQs+
No white cast on any skin tone, safe for acne-prone & sensitive skin, makeup-friendly, reapply every 3-4 hrs outdoors, oxybenzone-free. See the full FAQ section above.
Clinical Results+
SPF 50.083 (in-vivo), PA++++, 76.8% anti-pollution, +75.51% moisturization, -43.92% sebum control, 12+ hr photostability. Based on a study of 34 participants.
Manufacturing & expiry details+
Manufactured byMamaearth / Honasa Consumer Ltd.
Country of originIndia
Best before24 months from mfg. date
Use within6 months of opening (PAO 6M)
Marketed byHonasa Consumer Ltd., Gurugram, India
